skip_reason: dim-input.json stores level-level arrays for TwoNN (not per-task embeddings keyed by task_id). The linear probe requires embeddings indexed by task_id to match p-oracle labels. No such file was generated in Phase 65 (anchor embeddings are anonymous). P_probe diagnostic cannot be computed; this does NOT affect the §10 decision table.
post_hoc_note: P_probe uses P_oracle labels from Stage 71.3. It CANNOT replace P_GIT-sem/P_GIT-struct in the §10 decision table.
